summary: Verified 5 targeted changes on BrandLandingPage.js for brand pages (Whirlpool, Samsung). ALL 17 TESTS PASSED.

minor_observations.observation: 2 BreadcrumbList schemas appear on brand pages: 1) universal-breadcrumb-schema (2 items: Home > Brand), 2) brand-breadcrumb-{slug} (3 items: Home > Brands > Brand). This is a PRE-EXISTING issue from UniversalBreadcrumb.js race condition - NOT part of the 5 targeted changes.

1_no_float_btn_testid.details: No element with data-testid='float-btn' exists in DOM

2_no_brand_float_btn_class.details: No element with class 'brand-float-btn' exists in DOM

3_no_sticky_bar_mobile.details: No brand-specific fixed-position sticky bar at bottom on mobile viewport (global StickyCTA is present as expected)

4_breadcrumblist_schema_3_items.details: BreadcrumbList JSON-LD schema with id='brand-breadcrumb-{slug}' exists with 3 items: Home, Brands, [Brand] Appliance Repair

5_service_schema_exists.details: Service JSON-LD schema exists with serviceType='[Brand] Appliance Repair'

6_localbusiness_schema_exists.details: LocalBusiness JSON-LD schema exists with name='FixitBay LLC'

7_faqpage_schema_exists.details: FAQPage JSON-LD schema exists with 9 questions (Whirlpool)

8_eyebrow_problems_section.details: problems-section eyebrow contains 'Common Issues We Fix' (displayed uppercase via CSS textTransform)

9_eyebrow_before_call_section.details: before-call-section eyebrow contains 'What to Check Before You Call'

13_home_breadcrumb_touch_target.details: Home breadcrumb link has minHeight=44px (>= 44px touch target)

14_brands_breadcrumb_touch_target.details: Brands breadcrumb link has minHeight=44px (>= 44px touch target)

15_hero_section_complete.details: Hero section renders with h1, breadcrumb nav, logo, book CTA, call CTA

16_carousel_navigation.details: Carousel works - Next/Prev arrows clickable, transform changes from 0% to -33.33%

17_faq_accordion.details: FAQ accordion works - click opens (text length 262), click closes (text length 58)

targeted_changes_verified.1_internal_sticky_bar_removed: PASS - No data-testid='float-btn', no '.brand-float-btn' class, no brand-specific bottom sticky
targeted_changes_verified.2_floating_button_showFloat_removed: PASS - No floating button element or state remnants
targeted_changes_verified.3_breadcrumblist_schema_added: PASS - BreadcrumbList schema with 3 items (Home, Brands, [Brand] Appliance Repair) correctly injected
targeted_changes_verified.4_h2_eyebrow_capitalization_fixed: PASS - All 5 sections have correct eyebrow text (Common Issues We Fix, What to Check Before You Call, Where We Serve, Why Choose FixitBay, What Customers Say)
targeted_changes_verified.5_breadcrumb_touch_targets: PASS - Home and Brands links have minHeight: 44px, display: inline-flex, alignItems: center

critical_code_review_comments: Code review of BrandLandingPage.js lines 113-172: brandSchemas correctly defines BreadcrumbList with 3 items, Service, LocalBusiness, FAQPage schemas using useMemo
Code review of lines 212-217: Breadcrumb nav links correctly have minHeight: 44, display: inline-flex, alignItems: center, padding: 0 4px for touch targets
Code review of lines 338, 354, 369, 390, 411: All eyebrow text uses EYE style object with correct capitalization (CSS textTransform: uppercase handles visual display)
Line 494 comment confirms floating button was intentionally removed, global StickyCTA handles mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified 5 targeted changes on BrandLandingPage.js for brand pages. All pass. Pre-existing issue: 2 BreadcrumbList schemas appear (from UniversalBreadcrumb.js and from page-specific schema) - this is the same race condition noted in iteration_93. The brand-specific schema with 3 items (Home > Brands > [Brand]) is correctly added.
